root_cause.label: Campaign budget/bid/targeting issue
root_cause.evidence: All 6 ACTIVE ad groups carry budget_in_micro_currency = 0 EUR. Pinterest campaign analytics for the last 7 days returns []. With zero budget the auction cannot serve impressions, which fully explains 0 ad delivery and 0 outbound clicks.

secondary_causes.label: Pinterest Tag/CAPI dormant
secondary_causes.evidence: Conversion tag 'Pinterest Tag' (id 2612820116727) is ACTIVE but last_fired_time_ms is null. 0 rows in pinterest_capi_outbox last 7d. 0 add_to_cart / purchase events in pinterest_funnel_events.

secondary_causes.label: Billing readability blocked
secondary_causes.evidence: GET /ad_accounts/549770199501/billing_profiles returns 401 commerce_integration restricted feature. Cannot verify payment method via API.

secondary_causes.label: Organic publishing paused
secondary_causes.evidence: 0 pins published in last 30d. Publishing kill switches (global_stop=true, pcie2_publish_enabled=false) remain on.

secondary_causes.label: Attribution chain idle
secondary_causes.evidence: 0 utm_session_log rows with utm_source=pinterest last 7d, and 0 pin clicks to attribute, which is consistent with cause G.

ads_account_health.name: GetPawsy
flags: currency=EUR while campaign names target US — confirm intended billing/reporting currency

billing.api_error: Application does not have access to restricted feature commerce_integration

campaigns.name: Pinterest | Litter Box | US | Cold Traffic | V1
US - Auto Litter Box - Traffic - Jun2026

action_plan.problem: All 6 ACTIVE ad groups have 0 EUR budget
action_plan.evidence: budget_in_micro_currency=0 for every ad group; 7d analytics empty
action_plan.fix: Set realistic daily budget on each ad group in Ads Manager (start €5–10/day per ad group)
action_plan.effect: Unblocks ad delivery — primary lever for traffic

action_plan.problem: Cannot verify billing via API (commerce_integration restricted)
action_plan.fix: Open https://ads.pinterest.com/billing and confirm valid payment method, no outstanding balance, spending not disabled
action_plan.effect: Ensures ads can actually charge once budgets are set

action_plan.evidence: ads filter by campaign_id returns 0 items
action_plan.fix: Create at least one ad for this campaign or pause it

action_plan.problem: Pinterest conversion tag has never fired
action_plan.evidence: conversion_tags.last_fired_time_ms = null; 0 CAPI outbox events 7d; 0 add_to_cart/purchase funnel events
action_plan.fix: Confirm SafePinterestTag fires on production domain, then run a $0 test order to validate CAPI relay
action_plan.effect: Restores conversion attribution and optimisation signals

action_plan.fix: Once ads start delivering, validate destination URLs include utm_source=pinterest&utm_medium=paid_social&utm_campaign=<campaign_id>

action_plan.problem: Ad account currency=EUR while campaigns target US
action_plan.evidence: ad_account.country=NL currency=EUR; campaign names reference 'US Cold Traffic'
action_plan.fix: Confirm this is intentional. A US ad account would simplify reporting and may improve auction performance for US audiences
After ads deliver and trust score ≥60, unlock canary publishing
